svg.title: Tier B Mobile Robot — Software Architecture
svg.desc: Software architecture: Python planning layer, co-simulation bridge, ROS2 motion control on RPi4, micro-ROS firmware on ESP32, with communication channels
svg.text: Tier B Mobile Robot — Software Architecture
ROS 2 Humble · Python planning layer · Co-simulation bridge · micro-ROS firmware · linorobot2_hardware
Host PC · Ubuntu 22.04 · ROS 2 Humble · Python 3.12
Mobile Robot × 4 · Ubuntu 22.04 · ROS 2 Humble · micro-ROS
A1 — Python planning layer (coordinator_node.py, controller_node.py, cosim_manager.py)
Broadcasts r, v to all agents
Solves in y_i = z_i − c_i coords
A2 — Co-simulation bridge layer (cosim_config.py, cosim_bridge.py, cosim_logger.py)
A3 — MATLAB/Simulink (simulation-only, replaced by hardware at deploy)
From Workspace (u_ref_i) → Motion Controller → Unicycle ODE1 → To Workspace (odo_i)
Simulink fixed-step ODE1 · count-based stepForward · OCP closed-loop validation
C1 — ROS 2 motion control layer · RPi 4B · robot_agent.py
ZMQ REQ → sends r, v odom
C2 — Motor drive control layer · ESP32 · linorobot2_hardware · micro-ROS
C3 — Physical actuation and sensing · hardware components
U2: TB6612FNG · M1: JGA25-370 left · M2: JGA25-370 right · U5: MPU-6050 IMU
Encoder A/B → ISR → tick count → Δθ → v_wheel → EKF odometry → /odom/unfiltered
